title: Apply migration 20260502093001_lane02_aier_kb_rag_v1.sql to production Supabase
summary: Lane_02 has wired AIER chat backend end-to-end (worker route + hook + flag) per task spec. Build PASS. Endpoint code is syntactically and structurally complete. However, runtime is blocked because the SQL migration that creates RPC public.search_aier_kb has NOT been applied to live Supabase. The migration FILE exists in the uzgplus-app repo at supabase/migrations/20260502093001_lane02_aier_kb_rag_v1.sql (committed today 2026-05-02). PostgREST returns PGRST202 404 'function not found' when invoked. Lane_02 is forbidden per task §7 from running migrations against production Supabase. Requesting Lane_01 (or NTS direct) apply the migration so AIER chat can go live.

migration_creates: indexes idx_aier_kb_star, idx_aier_kb_palace, idx_aier_kb_star_palace, idx_aier_kb_embedding_hnsw (HNSW m=16 ef=64 cosine)

function public.search_aier_kb(p_query_embedding vector(1536), p_match_count int, p_tier text, p_star_filter text, p_palace_filter text) returns table(kb_id, star, palace, subject, content, depth_level, tags, similarity)
grant execute on function search_aier_kb to anon, authenticated

live_db_state.aier_kb_entries_table: EXISTS (168 rows confirmed via REST Content-Range)
live_db_state.schema_cache_error_response: {"code":"PGRST202","details":"Searched for the function public.search_aier_kb...but no matches were found in the schema cache."}

remediation_required.action: Apply migration to production Supabase (project kkhhpecofolmrodyeslp)
options: Option A: Supabase Studio -> SQL Editor -> paste contents of supabase/migrations/20260502093001_lane02_aier_kb_rag_v1.sql -> Run
Option B: supabase CLI from authorised host: supabase db push --include-all (requires SUPABASE_DB_URL or linked project)
Option C: psql -d $SUPABASE_DB_URL -f supabase/migrations/20260502093001_lane02_aier_kb_rag_v1.sql (requires direct connection string)
verification_after_apply: 1. SELECT routine_name FROM information_schema.routines WHERE routine_schema='public' AND routine_name='search_aier_kb'; -- expect 1 row
2. POST /rest/v1/rpc/search_aier_kb with valid 1536-dim vector + p_tier='explorer' -- expect 200 with up to 5 rows
3. cd D:\UZG\Projects-v2\uzgplus && curl -X POST <preview-url>/api/v1/tao/aier/chat with bearer + body -- expect SSE stream
remediation_required.rollback_plan: Migration is idempotent (CREATE IF NOT EXISTS / CREATE OR REPLACE). To rollback: DROP FUNCTION public.search_aier_kb(vector, int, text, text, text); -- table data preserved, indexes preserved, only the RPC function dropped.

downstream_unblocked_after_apply: Endpoint /api/v1/tao/aier/chat goes from 502 KB_SEARCH_FAILED -> 200 SSE stream
Hook useAierTaoChat real branch starts returning live Claude responses
Flag TAO_DATA_SOURCE.aierTao='real' goes from non-functional -> functional
V3 PWA route /v3/tao/aier exits MOCK + becomes production AIER chat
ack_required: YES (Lane_01 confirm migration applied or delegate to NTS)
next_required_action_for_lane_01: Apply migration via one of remediation options above. After apply, post ack to handoff inbox or notify Lane_02 via NOTIFICATION_LEDGER append.
